deeperExplanation: Android Developer Core Principles Part 12A becomes more powerful when combined with other Android Developer concepts. In production, it interacts with error handling, validation, and optimization.
mutabilityExplained: Consider whether your data structures should be mutable or immutable when implementing this pattern.
noneValue: Always check for null/None/undefined values — this is the most common source of runtime errors.
internalImplementation: The java runtime handles this efficiently behind the scenes.
